chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 3235 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 31.03.2026 Petitioner Muhammad Naeem Siddiqui is present in person. M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh and Sagheer Ahmed Abbasi, AAG along with Zaffar Abbas Unar, Accounts OfficerA.G. Sindh. ------------------------------------ Learned Addl. A.G. Sindh files statement / comments, taken on record. Along with the comments, the officer present files copy of payroll, taken on record. Per Payroll, a sum of Rs.22,83,204/- is credited in the account of the petitioner during the month of April. Copy of the same hands over to the petitioner. Upon receipt of copy of Payroll, the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition subject to all legal exceptions. The petition is; therefore, disposed of accordingly. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
